advisors.subtitle: Every question is analyzed by a specialized AI advisor trained in the relevant domain — not a generic chatbot

finance.title: Financial Advisor
finance.description: Analyzes investments, savings strategies, debt management, retirement planning, and major money decisions using financial modeling frameworks.
finance.examples: Should I invest in index funds or real estate?|Is it worth paying off my mortgage early?|Should I max out my 401k or pay student loans?

career.title: Career Strategist
career.description: Guides job transitions, promotions, salary negotiations, and long-term career planning with industry benchmarks and strategic frameworks.
career.examples: Should I leave my stable job for a startup?|Is an MBA worth it at 35?|Should I negotiate my salary or accept the offer?

health.title: Health & Wellness
health.description: Evaluates lifestyle changes, fitness goals, mental health decisions, and medical choices using research-backed methodologies and risk analysis.
health.examples: Should I try intermittent fasting?|Is it worth switching to a standing desk?|Should I see a therapist or try self-help first?

relationships.title: Relationship Counselor
relationships.description: Applies counseling frameworks to marriage, dating, family dynamics, and major relationship crossroads for thoughtful, balanced decisions.
relationships.examples: Should we move in together after 6 months?|Is couples therapy worth it?|Should I reconnect with an estranged family member?

education.title: Education Consultant
education.description: Compares degrees, certifications, bootcamps, and self-study paths with cost-benefit analysis and career outcome projections.
education.examples: Is a computer science degree worth it in 2025?|Should I do a coding bootcamp or self-teach?|Is getting a PhD worth the opportunity cost?

realEstate.title: Real Estate Advisor
realEstate.description: Models buy-vs-rent scenarios, home purchase timing, rental investments, and relocation costs with local market data considerations.
realEstate.examples: Should I buy a house now or wait?|Is renting really throwing money away?|Should I invest in a rental property?

lifestyle.title: Lifestyle Advisor
lifestyle.description: Navigates relocations, sabbaticals, digital nomad transitions, and major lifestyle pivots with practical scenario planning.
lifestyle.examples: Should I move abroad for a year?|Is taking a sabbatical worth the career risk?|Should I downsize to a tiny home?

business.title: Entrepreneurship Advisor
business.description: Evaluates venture viability, side hustle potential, market entry timing, and business model decisions with lean startup methodologies.
business.examples: Should I quit my job to start a business?|Is my side hustle worth scaling?|Should I take on a co-founder?

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about shouldi

q1.question: How accurate are the simulations?
q1.answer: Our models are based on real-world economic data, actuarial tables, and peer-reviewed research. While no prediction is perfect, we provide confidence ranges to help you understand the uncertainty. Most users find our predictions align closely with their actual outcomes.

q2.question: Can I simulate any decision?
q2.answer: Yes! While we offer pre-built scenarios for common decisions, you can describe any situation in natural language. Our AI will build a custom model for your unique circumstances.

q3.question: Is my data private?
q3.answer: Absolutely. We never sell or share your personal data. Your scenarios are encrypted and only accessible to you. You can delete your data at any time.

q4.question: What's the difference between free and paid plans?
q4.answer: The free plan lets you simulate any 2 topics with a 5-question analysis. Paid plans (per-scenario or Pro) use a 10-question in-depth analysis for more accurate, case-specific predictions. Pro gives you unlimited simulations.

q5.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
q5.answer: Yes, you can cancel at any time. If you cancel, you'll retain access until the end of your billing period. No questions asked.

q6.question: Do you offer refunds?
q6.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all subscription plans. If you're not satisfied, contact us for a full refund.

scenariosPage.title: Decision Scenarios
scenariosPage.subtitle: shouldi helps you think through major life decisions by simulating possible outcomes. Here are the scenarios currently available, with more on the way.

jobChange.title: Change Jobs
jobChange.description: Thinking about switching careers, accepting a new offer, or moving to a different industry? This scenario walks you through the key factors — salary changes, career growth potential, commute impact, and job satisfaction — to help you see the realistic range of outcomes before making the leap.

buyRent.title: Buy vs Rent
buyRent.description: One of the biggest financial decisions you'll face. This scenario compares the long-term financial impact of buying a home versus continuing to rent, factoring in property prices, interest rates, market trends, and your personal timeline to give you a clear side-by-side comparison.

relocate.title: Move to a New City
relocate.description: Relocating affects everything — your cost of living, income potential, social connections, and overall quality of life. This scenario helps you weigh the trade-offs of moving to a new city by analyzing how the change could impact your lifestyle and finances over time.

custom.title: Any Scenario Is Possible
custom.description: These are just the starting points. With shouldi, you can describe any decision in your own words — from starting a business and going back to school, to taking a gap year or making a major investment — and our AI will generate a personalized simulation tailored to your unique situation.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.subtitle: Helping people make better decisions through AI-powered simulation.
aboutPage.missionText: We believe every major life decision deserves careful analysis. shouldi was built to give everyone access to powerful decision simulation tools that were once only available to analysts and consultants. Our goal is to reduce regret and increase confidence in the choices that shape your life.
aboutPage.storyText: shouldi started with a simple observation: people spend more time researching a new phone than planning life-changing decisions like switching careers or buying a home. We set out to change that by creating a tool that makes it easy to explore different outcomes before committing to a path.
aboutPage.builtByText: shouldi is a product of ActOnData, a company focused on building intelligent tools that turn complex data into clear, actionable insights.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Have a question, feedback, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
contactPage.emailDescription: For any questions, partnerships, or support inquiries, drop us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

advisorsPage.title: Meet Your AI Advisors
advisorsPage.subtitle: Each advisor brings specialized expertise to analyze your decisions. They're automatically matched to your question — or you can choose one manually.
advisorsPage.ctaDescription: Ask any question and let the right advisor guide your simulation.

finance.longDescription: Our Financial Advisor applies certified financial planning frameworks to evaluate your money decisions. Whether you're weighing investment options, planning for retirement, managing debt, or making a major purchase, it models the financial impact across multiple scenarios — factoring in risk tolerance, time horizons, and opportunity costs.

career.longDescription: The Career Strategist draws on executive coaching methodologies and labor market data to help you navigate professional crossroads. From evaluating job offers and negotiating compensation to planning long-term career pivots, it provides structured analysis of both the tangible and intangible factors that shape career outcomes.
career.specialties: Job Transitions|Salary Negotiation|Career Pivots|Promotions|Work-Life Balance|Skill Development

health.longDescription: Our Health & Wellness advisor uses evidence-based health frameworks to help you think through lifestyle changes, fitness commitments, mental health decisions, and medical choices. It weighs scientific evidence, personal factors, and long-term wellbeing to model realistic outcomes for your health-related decisions.
health.specialties: Lifestyle Changes|Fitness Goals|Mental Health|Nutrition|Medical Decisions|Preventive Care

relationships.longDescription: The Relationship Counselor applies licensed therapy frameworks — including attachment theory, communication models, and family systems thinking — to help you navigate major relationship decisions. It provides balanced, thoughtful analysis for matters of the heart without rushing to judgment.

education.longDescription: Our Education Consultant takes an ROI-focused approach to learning decisions. It compares degree programs, certifications, bootcamps, and self-study paths using cost-benefit analysis, career outcome data, and your personal learning goals to help you invest wisely in your education.

realEstate.longDescription: The Real Estate Advisor brings property market expertise to your housing and investment decisions. It models buy-vs-rent scenarios, evaluates purchase timing, analyzes rental income potential, and factors in local market conditions, interest rates, and your financial situation to provide clear guidance.
realEstate.specialties: Buy vs. Rent|Home Buying|Investment Properties|Relocation|Refinancing|Market Timing

lifestyle.longDescription: Our Lifestyle Advisor specializes in the big life transitions that don't fit neatly into other categories. Whether you're considering moving abroad, taking a sabbatical, adopting a minimalist lifestyle, or making any major life pivot, it maps out the practical, emotional, and financial dimensions of your decision.

business.longDescription: The Entrepreneurship Advisor evaluates business opportunities using lean startup methodologies, market analysis frameworks, and financial modeling. From validating a startup idea to scaling a side hustle or choosing between co-founders, it helps you make data-informed entrepreneurial decisions.

helpPage.title: Help Center
helpPage.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about using shouldi

q1.question: What is shouldi?
q1.answer: shouldi is an AI-powered decision simulator that helps you explore the possible outcomes of major life decisions like changing jobs, buying a home, or relocating to a new city.

q2.question: How do I start a simulation?
q2.answer: Choose one of the available scenarios on the home page or create a custom scenario from your dashboard. Answer the guided questions, and our AI will generate a personalized analysis of your decision.

q3.question: Is shouldi free to use?
q3.answer: Yes! You can run simulations for free with our three built-in scenarios. Premium plans with unlimited scenarios and advanced features are coming soon.

q1.question: How accurate are the simulations?
q1.answer: Our simulations are based on AI analysis and general decision-making frameworks. They provide directional guidance and help you think through different angles, but they should not replace professional financial or legal advice.

q2.question: Can I save my simulation results?
q2.answer: Yes! Create a free account to save your simulation results to your dashboard. You can revisit and compare your scenarios at any time.

q3.question: Can I create custom scenarios?
q3.answer: Absolutely. From your dashboard, you can describe any decision and our AI will generate personalized questions and analysis tailored to your specific situation.

q1.question: How do I create an account?
q1.answer: Click the Sign Up button on the home page. You can register with your email address or sign in directly with your Google account.

q2.question: Can I delete my account?
q2.answer: Yes. Go to your dashboard, open Settings, and scroll to the Danger Zone section. You can permanently delete your account and all associated data from there.

q3.question: Is my data secure?
q3.answer: Yes. We use Firebase Authentication for secure login and Firestore with strict security rules so that only you can access your simulation data. We never share your personal data with third parties.

helpPage.contactText: Reach out to us at info@shouldi.io and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

guidesPage.title: Decision Guides
guidesPage.subtitle: Proven frameworks to help you think through tough choices with clarity

proscons.title: Pros & Cons Analysis
proscons.description: The classic approach to decision-making. List the advantages and disadvantages to see the full picture.
proscons.step1: Write down every pro and con you can think of for each option.
proscons.step2: Rate each item by importance (high, medium, low) to weigh what matters most.
proscons.step3: Count the weighted results and see which option comes out ahead.

weighted.title: Weighted Decision Matrix
weighted.description: A structured method for comparing multiple options across several criteria with different priorities.
weighted.step1: List your options and the criteria that matter (e.g. salary, location, growth).
weighted.step2: Assign a weight (1-5) to each criterion based on how important it is to you.
weighted.step3: Score each option against every criterion, multiply by weights, and compare totals.

goals.title: Goal Alignment Check
goals.description: Evaluate decisions by how well they align with your short-term and long-term life goals.
goals.step1: Write down your top 3-5 life goals for the next 1, 5, and 10 years.
goals.step2: For each option, rate how much it moves you toward or away from each goal.
goals.step3: Choose the option that best supports the majority of your most important goals.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.text: When you create an account, we collect your email address and display name. When you use our service, we store your simulation inputs and results. We also collect basic usage analytics to improve the product. We do not collect or store any payment information directly.

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.text: We use your information to provide and improve the shouldi service, including generating personalized simulations, saving your results, and communicating important updates about your account. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.text: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as required to operate the service (e.g. Firebase for authentication and data storage, Vercel for hosting) or as required by law.

security.title: Data Security
security.text: We use industry-standard security measures including encrypted connections (HTTPS), Firebase Authentication, and Firestore security rules that ensure only you can access your data. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can delete your account and all associated data from the Settings page in your dashboard. If you have questions about your data, contact us at info@shouldi.io.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info@shouldi.io. shouldi is a product of ActOnData (ActOnData.io).

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: By accessing or using shouldi, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the service. shouldi is operated by ActOnData (ActOnData.io).

services.title: Description of Services
services.text: shouldi provides AI-powered decision simulation tools that help users explore possible outcomes of life decisions. The simulations are for informational purposes only and should not be considered professional financial, legal, or medical advice.

accounts.title: User Accounts
accounts.text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You may not use another person's account without permission. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

content.title: User Content
content.text: You retain ownership of the data you input into simulations. By using the service, you grant us a limited license to process your inputs to generate simulation results. We do not claim ownership of your data and will not use your personal simulation data for purposes other than providing the service.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.text: shouldi is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for decisions made based on simulation results. The service is a tool to assist with decision-making, not a substitute for professional advice. In no event shall shouldi or ActOnData be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.text: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify registered users of significant changes via email. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at info@shouldi.io. shouldi is a product of ActOnData (ActOnData.io).

pricingPage.subtitle: Start free and upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees, no surprises.

free.title: Free

perScenario.title: Pay Per Scenario
perScenario.description: Need more than two scenarios? Unlock additional simulations one at a time with deeper, 10-question analysis for more accurate results.

monthly.title: Pro
monthly.description: For power users who want unlimited access. Run as many simulations as you need with maximum detail, priority support, and early access to new features.

pricingPage.note: The Free plan is available now. Pay Per Scenario and Pro plans are coming soon.

banner.title: We use cookies
banner.description: We use cookies to keep you signed in, improve your experience, and understand how you use shouldi.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.description: Required for authentication, security, and basic site functionality. These cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Help us understand how visitors use the site so we can improve the experience.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: Used to deliver relevant ads and measure campaign effectiveness.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.intro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how shouldi uses them, the types of cookies we use, and how you can manage your cookie preferences.

whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences, keep you signed in, and understand how you interact with the service. Some cookies are essential for the site to work, while others help us improve your experience.

necessary.title: Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function. They enable core features like user authentication, session management, and security. You cannot opt out of these cookies.

session.name: Session & Authentication
session.purpose: Keeps you signed in and maintains your session securely across pages. Powered by Firebase Authentication.

consent.name: Cookie Consent Preferences
consent.purpose: Stores your cookie preferences so we don't ask you again on every visit.

csrf.name: Security Token
csrf.purpose: Protects against cross-site request forgery attacks to keep your account safe.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with shouldi. We use this data to improve the product, fix issues, and measure feature usage. No personally identifiable information is collected.

vercelAnalytics.name: Vercel Web Analytics
vercelAnalytics.purpose: Collects anonymous usage data such as page views, referral sources, and device types to help us understand traffic patterns.

performance.name: Performance Monitoring
performance.purpose: Measures page load times and application performance to help us identify and fix slow pages.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: These cookies may be used in the future to deliver relevant advertisements and track campaign performance. They are currently not active but are included here for transparency as we plan to introduce paid plans.

adPersonalization.name: Ad Personalization
adPersonalization.purpose: May be used to show you relevant ads based on your interests and browsing behavior across sites.

retargeting.name: Retargeting
retargeting.purpose: May be used to re-engage visitors who have previously interacted with shouldi.

managing.title: Managing Your Cookies
managing.text: You can change your cookie preferences at any time using the cookie banner that appears when you first visit the site. You can also delete cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling necessary cookies may prevent you from signing in or using certain features of the site.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at info@shouldi.io. shouldi is a product of ActOnData (ActOnData.io).

moderation.title: Content Policy Violation
moderation.description: Your input contains content that violates our usage policy. shouldi is designed to help with constructive life decisions. Please rephrase your question appropriately.
moderation.surveyDescription: Your input contains content that violates our usage policy. This analysis session has been closed.
